name: Studio Teleprompter
description: A smooth-scrolling teleprompter with mirror support.

customActions.name: Pause Scrolling
customActions.description: Temporarily stops the text from moving.

scriptText.title: Prompter Script
scriptText.description: Enter the text to be read.
scriptText.default:
WELCOME TO THE FUTURE OF PROFESSIONAL BROADCASTING.

FOR DECADES, OUR INDUSTRY RELIED ON HEAVY, PURPOSE-BUILT HARDWARE. MASSIVE SWITCHERS, DEDICATED GRAPHICS ENGINES, AND MILES OF S.D.I. CABLES DEFINED THE STUDIO.

BUT TODAY, WE ARE WITNESSING A MONUMENTAL SHIFT. THE TRANSITION TO SOFTWARE-DEFINED WORKFLOWS IS COMPLETELY REWRITING THE RULES OF LIVE PRODUCTION.

BY MOVING FROM RIGID HARDWARE TO FLEXIBLE, I.P. BASED SOFTWARE ENVIRONMENTS, BROADCASTERS CAN NOW SPIN UP ENTIRE CONTROL ROOMS IN THE CLOUD.

WE ARE UNLOCKING UNPRECEDENTED SCALABILITY, ALLOWING REMOTE TEAMS TO COLLABORATE IN REAL-TIME FROM ANYWHERE IN THE WORLD.

OPEN STANDARDS AND WEB-BASED GRAPHICS, LIKE THE NEW O-GRAF SPECIFICATION, ARE TEARING DOWN PROPRIETARY WALLS. THIS MEANS FASTER UPDATES, DEEPER INTEGRATIONS WITH A.I. TOOLS, AND THE FREEDOM TO INNOVATE AT THE SPEED OF SOFTWARE.

THE CONTROL ROOM OF TOMORROW ISN'T A ROOM AT ALL... IT IS A COMPLETELY VIRTUALIZED ECOSYSTEM. AND IT IS HAPPENING RIGHT NOW.

enableVoiceTracking.title: Enable Voice Tracking
enableVoiceTracking.description: Actively listens to the speaker and automatically scrolls to keep the current word at the cue marker.

voiceLanguage.title: Voice Tracking Language
voiceLanguage.description: Select the language the talent is speaking.

fontSize.title: Font Size (vw)
fontSize.description: Adjust the size of the text relative to screen width. Default is 6.

enableCountdown.title: Enable 3-Second Countdown
enableCountdown.description: Displays a visual 3-2-1 countdown before the scrolling begins.

showStatusBar.title: Show Status Bar
showStatusBar.description: Displays the elapsed reading time at the top of the screen.
